installed.noMatch: No installed skills match your filters.

skill.noContentHintSwitch: Switch to Edit to write or paste skill content.
skill.noContentHintType: Start typing on the left to see a preview.

origin.cannotConfigure: Agent links are managed by the user for this skill

skillFiles.binaryFile: Binary file — cannot preview in app

createSkill.title: Create New Skill
createSkill.name: Name
createSkill.nameInvalid: Only letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores, and dots. Must start with a letter or number.
createSkill.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this skill does...
createSkill.contentPlaceholder:
# My Skill

Write your skill content here...
createSkill.emptyHint: Start typing to see a live preview on the right.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.network: Network error. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.cliMissing: Required tools not found. Make sure Node.js and npx are installed.
error.permDenied: Permission denied. Check that the skills directory is accessible.
error.diskFull: Disk is full. Free up some space and try again.
error.skillNotFound: This skill no longer exists on disk.
error.repoNotFound: Repository not found. It may be private or the link is incorrect.
error.rateLimit: GitHub API rate limit reached. Please wait and try again later.
error.repoTooLarge: Repository exceeds the size limit and cannot be loaded.
error.generic: Could not complete the operation. Please try again.

configureDialog.title: Agent Configuration
configureDialog.description: Manage which agents have access to

removeDialog.title: Remove Skill
removeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove
removeDialog.warning: Agent links and local files will also be removed.

archiveDialog.title: Archive Skill
archiveDialog.warning: It will be removed from active skills and agent links, but can be restored from Archive.
archiveDialog.dirtyHint: Save or discard changes before archiving this skill.

restoreDialog.warning: Skills will be restored to their original directories and previous agent links when possible.

consistency.duplicateHint: Same name, same content: Identical skills exist in multiple locations. You can merge them into SSOT for unified management.
consistency.conflictHint: Same name, different content: These skills have the same name but different content. Review them and decide which version to keep.
consistency.noConflicts: All same-named skills have identical content
consistency.mergeConfirmDesc: All copies of skill "{{name}}" will be merged into the SSOT directory.
consistency.mergeStep1: Content will be copied to the SSOT directory
consistency.mergeStep3: Symlinks will be created for affected agents
consistency.deleteDirsLabel: Directories to be replaced with symlinks:
consistency.noMismatches: All skill names match their folders
consistency.mismatchHint: Name mismatch: The name field in SKILL.md doesn't match the folder name. Consider renaming to keep them consistent.
consistency.mergeAllConfirmDesc: The following {{count}} duplicate groups will be merged:

unsavedDialog.title: Unsaved Changes
unsavedDialog.description: You have unsaved changes. Switching to another skill will discard your edits.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose the appearance theme for the app

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for the app

maintenance.title: Skill Maintenance
maintenance.checkUpdateDesc: Check installed skills for new versions on GitHub
maintenance.checkingDesc: Connecting to GitHub to check for updates...
maintenance.allUpToDate: All skills are up to date
maintenance.checkPartial: API rate limited — showing partial results
maintenance.updateAllDesc: Pull the latest version of all installed skills from Git repositories
maintenance.rescanDesc: Re-scan filesystem to discover new or removed skills
maintenance.hideNonSsotDesc: Only show skills managed by Skill Zoo, hide user-placed skills in agent directories
maintenance.clearCacheDesc: Remove cached repository archives to free up disk space

agentPaths.title: Agent Settings
agentPaths.description: Manage agent visibility and skill directory paths
agentPaths.hiddenHint: Hidden agents won't appear in skill configuration or receive symlinked skills.
agentPaths.minOneWarning: At least one agent must remain visible.

about.title: About
about.description: Agent Skill Manager — Unified management for skills in Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and more

updater.upToDate: Skill Zoo is up to date

feedback.hint: Opens GitHub Issues in your browser with app info pre-filled.
